title: Level 789
wikitext:
{{Blurbackground|file=Rocket22.jpg}} {{Fullscreen|content= {{DISPLAYTITLE:'''Level 789: Endless Blue Sea of Emptiness...'''}} {{Blurbackground|file=Luna(2).jpg}}
Endless Blue Sea of Emptiness...
{{Image Banner|image=Earth3.jpg|caption=
Eternal finale...
}}
LEVEL '''789'''
THREAT INDEX
ψ

'''Exit:''' 4/5
Extremely hard to exit.
'''Environment:''' 0/5
No enviromental hazards present.
'''Psychological aspect:''' 5/5
Presence of severe psychological hazards.
''Memories are slowly dissolving, filling off the top of my mind with feelings of bitter renewal that were never graced beforehand by me, for the most part, in this place, at the same time, slowly cleansing everything that was fond of me, albeit filling the insides of my heart with determination, whose goal is to warn other souls of this dimension,'' ''Can’t say that was not my fault, as I’ve brought this torture upon myself, being too selfish for the normal world, and a well-deserved punishment for my actions, sparsely thinking about its possible consequences. My mirroring reflection of myself reminds of past mistakes that I’ve ever made in my earthly life. Salvation is not an option anymore, only a cold, empty sensation. Fury and sufferings slowly whisper the finales of my end-times sentence, growling like a thousand voices, - but never heard. My end fate is decided by everything except me, and my personal dementioning decause. Acceptance marched to my location relatively long ago; as of right now, I don’t have any reasonable reasons to fear, for sure.'' ''Once upon a time, there was I, a dreaming man who falsely believed that cosmos was a good wonder, just unexplored, and one day, I began to plan, about my endless, never-ending thought journey in space – my absolute reward, which I strongly adored. It all wasn’t ignored, after all, and now – fully explored. '' ''Sleeping in my doss, wondering about the unknown, my mind begone, simply shattered across the wonder, trapping my consciousness and body in the dark, empty place, full of dementing thoughts about my soon demise, which I should have foreseen before and which I shouldn’t own, but still, this is my personal, final blunder.'' ''There was no sunlight, but everything was lightened up by unknown causes. There was no sound, only the deafening silence that filled the darkened dimension of void with indescribable ambience – whispers of my own consciousness, desperately trying to comprehend the vastness and greatness of my dream. Time has stopped its usual movement, letting this place rot in endless twilight, in never-ending, mashed-up sonatas of the eternal darkness. My self-esteem has failed me, to my final gleam, to my final scheme.'' ''I tried to move, only to be undesirably greeted with failure in doing it, as everything was appearing blurry and covered in wake-up fog, and my body being too stiff for it. Blinking didn’t work as expected, seemingly taunting me for the decision of their closure while still allowing the small glimpse of vertical vision. My tears were slowly boiling off to steam while I tried to desperatly twitch, as I realized that my movement was completely prohibited, waiting for me to admit my mis-hit, Outer space had fallen in my eyes, being reduced to a vulturing death-position and my mind’s end decision, which has inevitably doomed me to my final position - acceptance of my eternal realm disposition.'' ''I looked up to see what’s commonly called in the normal world as '''«Moon»''', being replaced with an unmovable, never-changing illusion of it, that provides constant shadow darkening in this realm. There were no stars, only darkness. My mother once told me about a legend that taught me about the possible hypothesis of stars being the never-extinguishable flames of dead souls. I started remember it, than, thinking about the fact that I was the one to possibly become the first being merged with the one with the sky. Shortly after I looked down, seeing the endlessly stretching plain of terrain, mimicking by its color the surface of Earth, to the very core of sharpness. My mind and shattered fragments of consciousness stopped relying on their past, moving on to the epoch of high, eternal deny. '' ''No one heard my screams or sufferings, as if the '''Lord''' himself punished me for my sins with his true, righteous judgement of people’s fate. Every emotion was slowly fading, being replaced with the twisted replication of them, to the very bottom of the cold, bottomless emptiness of void. But still, my hope was not extinguished whatsoever, but always had been amplified when I thought of stories like this and realized that I need to warn another people of this, endtimes wait. Even though I was annoyed, toyed with, I, deep inside hoped that my mind and possible chance of retry, would be never, truly destroyed.'' ''Sleep paralysis scattered my feelings across shattered mind, making my «life» unbearable, but still comfortable, as I remembered my past struggles, and that I always overcame deepest regrets about my, now forgotten past. Unwavering, I managed to live through the darkest of the times, while fighting my inner, seemingly false hopes and dreams, in the empty, lone darkness, called space-time continuum – the eternal vacuum. Repentance never came to my consciousness, even when I wanted it, as salvation did, much like I was tortured, to the very last second of my belonginess to this, twisted, vast dimension, to the time, everlast. My eyes burn filled me to the very bottom with agony, allowing it to slowly advance, as I flied across never ending plain of Earth-like patterns, that was enveloping spreaded by my, now blood-red vision. Every silhouette I’ve ever seen while being here has been burned to my retina, allowing me, to see the gnawing consequences of my mistake, and their entire, feeded by my sufferings loop.'' ''Slowly, but completely surely, the stiffness of my limbs and body started to fade away, being replaced with pleasurable feeling that fractured my left-over senses, by unknown means comforting me like an living being. Screech spreaded across never-ending emptiness, growling like an unseen by any human means cosmic wind, as I tried to look up, to the moon. I felt a bone-chilling cold, as my mind started reading a prayer, in desperate attempt to calm down my psyche. Nothing happened, just void. Fragmented echo strolled across outerspace, dementingly reminding me of my past mistakes, carried by the shattered voices, made by the memories of the past, taunting me for every misstep I did in my Earthly life, to the very single speaking bottom, to the very decayed seeing. Nothing happened, nothing thanked, nothing…. To the endless emptiness, that I now worship, to the endless documentation of anomalies, I like to see one say new something… But still, if I know that I’m surely doomed, why don’t help other individuals don’t get stuck here? After all, I know for certain: {{Blurimage|file=Lunar2.png|align=center|width=600px|hovertext=Luna Liminalis...|caption='''''This is my, eternal hell-sent gift of life devoid.'''''}} ''Everlasting thought one day struck my defragmented subconsciousness – '''''«What’s the matter of continuing, if the point of no return was breached a long ago, when I unwillingly entered this place?»''''', bringing my usual state to shattered fall, when I realized that giving up, is only, true way to end my endless torment, Since then, I was trying to find a definitive answer to my problems, always falling in the eternal loop of this deeply broken realm, when coming to conclusion, that my situation is truly hopeless, without any blink of light, sickly reminding me of the sky above – the final, penultimate limit in my life cycle, I questioned every bit of existence I could think of, never seeing the end of this darkness funnel. Hopelessness was the only thing I’ve remembered from those times, with no determined end, I never realized the absurdness of my standard life, being filled to the very brim with viscous fog of dementing battle, where I deeply basked in. I never truly grasped the strangeness of this existence, that was keeping my documentation going on since the beginning of the wretched cycle of writing. I seemingly closed my eyes, in the front of never-ending deep blue pit, that was continuing to spit out of itself the countless dozens of paragraphs, that was never written by me in this place fate recycle. '''''I don’t know why I’m starting to communicate like this, in this strange, philosophical style of write, what i believe can possible originate from the presence of another anomalies inside this realm.'''''
'''''Entrances And Exits:'''''
'''''Entrances:'''''
''Wandering too deep in subconscious state has small chance to take wanderer here.''
'''''Exits:'''''
Falling from the Earth's orbit can take individuals to the [[Level 398|'''''Level 398.''''']] Prolonged exposure of wanderer eyes to Moon's surface have been reported by individuals to take one to [[Level 700|'''''Level 700.''''']], but this remains unconfirmed, thus small amount of recorded legitable evidence have been ever provided.
